column1: # (no 'package:' line — deliberately unset, see board.toml and issue #73)
# pin  row  col  pio  dir  label  function  confidence
# Board-specific pin annotations are not yet reverse-engineered, and no package
# is declared: apicula ships no table matching the physical QN48, and every
# table it does ship yields pin numbers that do not apply to this board (#73).
# The GOWIN pad_map builder therefore names each pad after its IOB location
# only (source='gowin_iob_unbonded'), which is package-independent and lossless.
# Physical pin numbers, when needed, come from the vendor GW1N-2/QFN48 table —
